title: PVP ZeroX
description: A shader that visually assists in PVP!
body:
# ABOUT:
PVP ZeroX is a shader designed for PVP.

It adds:
- Motion Blur (a cool graphic effect that improves game smoothness)
- TAA (removes flickering, more information in the frame)

Features that allow you to focus on PVP:
- Full lighting brightness
- Bright color highlighting of players and mobs
- Arrow highlighting
- Particle disable
- Sharpness adjustment (make the image clearer!)
- Terrain saturation reduction (nothing should distract you from PVP)

All settings can be adjusted, enabled, or disabled. There are also 3 presets to suit your taste. If you have any ideas for what else to add, please write to [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh).

## PVP GIF:
![PVP Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CjpZFrHx/images/440766bd8004dce72a6d8946c559964f24d08cf4.gif)

## LINKS:
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/Cz2sCWz5Wh) (Discuss, Bug Reports, Etc.)
- [Telegram](https://t.me/LoLip_p_Community)
- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@lolip_p)

## INSTALL THE SHADERS
- Download Client Which Supports Installing Shaders Such As Optifine And Iris
- Download The Shaders
- Copy Shaders to /.minecraft/shaderpacks
- Launch Minecraft, Go To Options --> Video Settings --> Shaders
- Choose **PVP ZeroX**
